rulings.Case Title: J.R. MARKETING, LLC., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED et al VS. HARTFORD CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFF NOBLE LOCKS ENTERPRISES, INC.'S COUNSEL'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CLAUDIA BLANCO et al VS. AMERICAN MORTGAGE EXPRESS CORP., AN ENTITY OF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANT CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 3RD, 4TH-7TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED FACTS TO SUPPORT THESE CLAIMS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT EVIDENCE ACTIONS BY CMC THAT CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S TO MISUNDERSTAND THEIR RIGHTS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANT EXXONMOBIL OIL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFF F. ALIOTO COMPANY, INC. TO FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND SECOND SET OF REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. CONTINUED TO JUNE 7, 2011 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JEEBA ABBEYQUAYE VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANT CORNELY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT ACTED OUTRAGEOUSLY WITH RECKLESS DISREGARD OF THE PROBABILITY OF CAUSING PLAINTIFF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION (UCL) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JEEBA ABBEYQUAYE VS. CHARLES BELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANT CORNELY COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE PRAYERS FOR ATTORNEYS FEES, RESTITUTION, AND TREBLE DAMAGES AS TO CORNELY COMPANY. THE MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND PREJUDGMENT INTEREST IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: DAKIN SHAKER VS. NATURE'S PATH FOODS, INC., et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN BERNARDINO COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Orders 1) Dismissing The Action; Or, Alternativly, 2) Transferring Venue; And 3) Awarding Fees And Costs; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANTS NATURE'S PATH FOODS, INC., A CANADIAN CORPORATION, STATER BROS. MARKETS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S Motion For Orders 1) Dismissing The Action; Or, Alternatively, 2) Transferring Venue; And 3) Awarding Fees And Costs. DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR AN ORDER DISMISSING THE ACTION OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TRANSFERRING VENUE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PRESENT COMPETENT EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATING WHERE DEFENDANTS RESIDE. THE PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS ARE SUSTAINED. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC VS. SANDI W MA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 6, DEFENDANTS SANDI MA, LIAN NG'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 4TH, 5TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANTS HAD KNOWLEDGE OF PLAINTIFF'S RELATIONSHIP WITH THE PRIOR OWNER (FORMER LANDLORD) AND INTENDED TO DISRUPT THAT RELATIONSHIP. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 7, DEFENDANT HOSPIRA INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Complaint Of Clara Taylor On Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens. OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. DEFENDANT DISMISSED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ANUNCIO L. SULLA JR. VS. BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING DEPARTMENT OF CONSUMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 2, 2011, line 8, Order To Show Cause Re Writ Of Mandate. PETITIONER'S WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. THE DECISION OF THE ALJ FOR VIOLATIONS OF BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE SECTION 2762 IS INCONSISTENT WITH ITS SPECIFIC FINDING THAT THERE WAS NO SUBSTANTIAL RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE CRIME AND PLAINTIFF'S PROFESSION. THE COURT REMANDS THE CASE TO RESPONDENT TO MAKE ALL FINDINGS AND CONCLUSIONS CONSISTENT WITH THE EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. =(302/LMG)
